title: Help Me Hardcore
description: Help Me Hardcore Adds All Kinds of Extra Challenges from Community Ideas to Full-Themed Updates for Your Hardcore Worlds or Even Hardcore SMP Servers!
body:
Help Me Hardcore Will now be on Modrinth in 3 parts
hmh = world generation / hmh2 = functionality / hmh3 = Bonus

Hmh.jar - World Generation
The most important thing when loading a new server is ensuring that everything generates first. This is simply because once a chuck is loaded you cannot add new features without resetting the chunk :<
Features include 
6 Tree Types such as the banana and mango tree :>
16 Entites from cute penguins in the overworld, to scary demons in the nether, this mod also included some of the missing Mob Votes such as The Great Hunger, and Blazing Inferno! 
50+ Ores from amber to ruby to sapphire to zircon, you'll find a huge selection of ores to look for :O
Note:Hmh is just world generation, and most of the planned functionalities will come out with hmh2, since I'm a slow developer and this mod is soooo big, I added Blaze and Craft's Advancement Pack to entertain players while they wait on the next part of the update.

Hmh2.jar - Functionality
hmh.jar has some hidden code that waits until the hmh2.jar is found to add functionality to the old context. For Example The Shadow Creature that spawns in hmh.jar is supposed to give a Health Shrinkage Status Effect, but without the register effects in hmh2.jar Shadow Creatures will only do normal attack damage, and will not attack with status effects until you have both hmh.jar and hmh2.jar together.
Other Features Should include things like
Added recipes, armor, weapons, tools, ect.
All the Jewels found in hmh.jar ores can now be used for magic dust, potions, blocks, fluids, uniquely custom-crafted items, and other magicky.
Players can now claim to be certain Professions such as the Necromancer, Sorcerer, Blood Witch, and more.
20+ Status Effects From cool things like the Spider Effect to climb on walls to More dangrous effects like Kindling that makes players burn faster or, Ash Lung which basically poisons a player if they are in a basalt deltas too long unprepared.
The Biggest Feature is the Revival Stone which allows players to bring back spectating players, however for every time you die you will lose 1 heart/death permanently, so if you die 10 times, then it's like traditional hardcore and there is no coming back anymore :<

Hmh3.jar - Bonus
Hmh.jar and Hmh2.jar are the bare minimum of what's needed to have the coolest server, but this mod also has a couple of extra bonus content from decorations to silly community ideas, I'll add almost anything to make things more intersting, and fun for all kinds of players.

If you have any questions, you can join the discord in the links section :>
Note: This mod is used and was created for A public Hardcore Multiplayer Server, so if that seems of interest to you all well, you can also ask in the discord, feedback of all kinds is always welcome and well thought out <3
